steps.title: Find the pasture percentage
steps.content:
Cropland comprises 44.0% of the tract, so the remaining pasture is:
$$100\% - 44\% = 56\%$$

steps.title: Calculate each region's building coverage as a percentage of the total tract
steps.content:
Cropland: Buildings cover 22.5% of the cropland, which itself is 44% of the total tract. Multiply the percentages:
$$0.225 \times 0.44 = 0.099 = 9.9\%$$ of the total tract

Pasture: Buildings cover 15% of the pasture, which itself is 56% of the total tract.
$$0.15 \times 0.56 = 0.084 = 8.4\%$$ of the total tract

Total buildings on the tract:
$$p = 9.9\% + 8.4\% = 18.3\%$$
